scope: Unified site validation checklist for DTS4160, BHE BRTL32, and NEC PABX SNMP lines.

networkReadiness.item: Confirm device or gateway IP address for each SNMP line.
Confirm source IP allow-list and firewall paths.
Confirm trap receiver IP and UDP port if traps are supported.

snmpSecurity.item: Confirm community or SNMPv3 credential ownership and handling.

deviceIdentity.item: Map device serial number or identifier to customer asset ID.
Confirm site, zone, room, rack, panel, or equipment location.

oidValidation.item: Validate DTS alarm OID normal, active, and clear polling.
Validate BHE AlarmMom normal, active, and clear polling.
Discover exact NEC child OIDs for CPU, traffic, port, terminal, sysMessage, and registrationInfo.

trapValidation.item: Capture BHE bheBRTL36Trap active, clear, and heartbeat samples.
Capture NEC Failure Message trap sample.
Confirm whether DTS alarm changes emit traps.

alarmLifecycle.item: Capture active alarm sample for each system under approved test procedure.
Confirm latching and acknowledgement behavior where applicable.

clearLifecycle.item: Capture clear sample after active condition.
Confirm active-to-clear correlation fields or timestamps.

gatewayValidation.item: Confirm BHE access mode and bridge/gateway owner.
Test BHE gateway/serial bridge failure behavior.

oneMapping.item: Confirm expected ONE event key and route for each validated alarm.
Confirm severity policy and work order implication.

evidenceCapture.item: Capture raw OID/trap name, raw value, decoded meaning, timestamp, and test operator.
Redact credentials before committing derived evidence.

remainingBlockers.item: No production decoder until live samples and vendor/customer sign-off are complete.
